Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 40}You may encounter {f 0 1 2}Greedy Shadows{f 0 1 27} while exploring. These Shadows amass items by looting treasure chests, so expect {f 0 1 2}greater rewards{f 0 1 27} for defeating them than rare Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 40}Greedy Shadows are always scampering helter-skelter, so catching them is {f 0 1 2}a matter of luck{f 0 1 27}. If you lose sight of one at a juncture, {f 0 1 2}track them to the best of your ability{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Even if one slips away, they will sometimes {f 0 1 2}drop items{f 0 1 27}. The more correct guesses you make on {f 0 1 2}which way they go at junctures{f 0 1 27}, the more items they'll drop.[n]{f 1 1}
